info.title: Presensi Event Alumni Pesantren API
info.description: API documentation for Presensi Event Alumni Pesantren system.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all alumni users. Admin only.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, email, or angkatan

post.description: Creates a new alumni account manually by admin.

get.description: Returns detail of a specific alumni user by ID. Admin only.

put.description: Updates data of a specific alumni user. Admin only.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an alumni user by ID. Admin only.

post.description: Sends WhatsApp broadcast to alumni. Target options: "all" = semua alumni, "registered" = yang sudah daftar event ini, "custom" = nomor pilihan manual.

target.description: all = semua alumni | registered = yang sudah daftar event ini | custom = input nomor manual

400.description: Broadcast failed atau tidak ada penerima

get.description: Returns preview pesan WA dan jumlah penerima berdasarkan target.
Returns paginated list of all events. Admin only.

post.description: Creates a new event and auto-generates a QR code. Admin only.

get.description: Returns detail of a specific event including attendance count.

put.description: Updates event data. QR token is not affected. Admin only.

delete.description: Deletes an event and its QR code image. Admin only.

patch.description: Toggles event status between active and inactive. Admin only.

get.description: Returns list of alumni who attended a specific event. Admin only.
Returns the QR Code SVG image of a specific event directly in browser.
Returns list of alumni who registered for a specific event. Admin only.

post.description: Creates a new alumni account and returns an access token.
Authenticates user credentials and returns an access token.
Revokes the current user access token.

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user data.

post.description: Alumni scans QR code to record attendance. Validates event status, time window, and prevents double scan.

400.description: Scan failed (inactive, out of window, or double scan)

get.description: Returns the attendance history of the currently logged-in alumni.
Returns list of active events available for registration.
Returns detail of a specific event including quota and registration status.

post.description: Alumni registers for an event. Checks quota availability and prevents duplicate registration.

delete.description: Alumni cancels their registration for an event.
